name: Ares Management Corporation 6.75% Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
summary: Ares Management Corporation 6.75% Series B Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock represents a specific class of preferred stock issued by Ares Management Corporation, a global alternative investment manager. This preferred stock has a mandatory conversion feature and pays a fixed dividend of 6.75%. Ares Management Corporation is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
